dict.string: Xavier Yang, Tianshu Wang, Aziz Alto, Josh Devlin, Christian Stade-Schuldt, Joel Nothman, Angelo Varlotta

array.string: Tackle the Curse of Imbalanced Datasets in Machine Learning
open-source tool for building publication-quality books and documents
implementation of a grammar of graphics based on ggplot2
N-D labeled arrays and datasets in Python
